comment.body:
I have a related question... what vol shall we track and in what timeframe, to observe the vol/spot beta??

Alma uses VIX's IV and RV a lot in her posts, and the timeframe is daily. But I assume the intraday movement also matters when the price is about to spin at or breakthrough the zero Vanna point, isn't it?
I tried to track 0DTE SPX's ATM vol, but it's always move in the opposite direction of SPX in a short timespan(10-30 min), and in a longer timespan (a few hours) it always goes down towards zero because it's going to expire soon.
comment.raw_body:
I have a related question... what vol shall we track and in what timeframe, to observe the vol/spot beta??

Alma uses VIX's IV and RV a lot in her posts, and the timeframe is daily. But I assume the intraday movement also matters when the price is about to spin at or breakthrough the zero Vanna point, isn't it?
I tried to track 0DTE SPX's ATM vol, but it's always move in the opposite direction of SPX in a short timespan(10-30 min), and in a longer timespan (a few hours) it always goes down towards zero because it's going to expire soon.

comment.raw_body: Any free tools out there to chart Intra day ATM vol and Vega? Or should I get busy with IBKR api

comment.body:
I subscribe IBKR too.

But I have also purchased some SPX option data from Theta Data in the past. 2023-2024 SPX weekly options(0-1DTE) with premium, volume, greeks(including IV) info. Resolution is one minute.
So I can get the data of 0-1DTE SPX ATM(or other delta/strike) IV per minute in the past two years. If you or anyone who have any idea to check some vol change curve, I can help to provide the result.
